title: Weekly Tafseer Circle
description: Join us every Friday after Maghrib for a weekly tafseer circle exploring the meanings of the Quran with Sheikh Ahmad.

title: Community Iftar Gathering
description: A community iftar bringing families together with shared meals, children's activities, and evening prayers.

title: Youth Football Tournament
description: Annual youth football tournament promoting teamwork, fitness, and brotherhood among our young community members.

title: Mosque Open Day
description: Welcome neighbours and friends to learn about Islam, tour our facilities, and enjoy refreshments.

title: Annual Fundraising Dinner
description: Support mosque development projects at our annual fundraising dinner with guest speakers and community awards.
